title: クレーンゲームに挑戦！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while I'm out and about with Kawakami
Princess...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I follow her gaze and see a claw machine filled
with Umamusume plushies.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
No thanks. I'm not interested in that kind of thing
at all.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
It wouldn't be very elegant of a princess to get
obsessed with a claw machine.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Besides which, it's impossible to grab a plushie
with such a weak claw! IMPOSSIBLE, I tell you!
choice_data_list: I take it you've failed at this before.
I take it you've failed at this before.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh, let's just forget it. That weak little baby
claw's not gonna—
choice_data_list: Even small amounts of strength can be useful.
Even small amounts of strength can be useful.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Ah! Now that you mention it, in Princess Fighter
episode twenty-six, they say, "Don't be deceived
by the size of a crab's claw!"

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
"When used the right way, even the smallest
pinch can capture a massive whale!"

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, please show me the strength of that tiny
crab!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There's no way I can fail now!
